sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112702" key="fusiklei/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῠσικλείδιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n112702.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a spell to open the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φύσις</foreign> (i.e. pudendum muliebre), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">PMag.Osl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.283</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
